text.title: AI Product Marketing Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether ai-product-marketing-patterns applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the product user-facing AI with a marketing surface AND a non-commodity positioning intent?

branch.conclusion: Generic 'AI-powered' positioning is the chosen strategy.

example.description: When `yes AND high_risk_or_regulated` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r2` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
